image:image.image:title: Fractals — debut single by Suhas Padav ft. Ric Fierabracci and Marco Minnemann
image:image.image:caption: Album artwork for Fractals by Suhas Padav, progressive jazz fusion pianist and composer, featuring bassist Ric Fierabracci and drummer Marco Minnemann

image:image.image:title: Suhas Padav — Progressive Jazz Fusion Pianist and Composer
image:image.image:caption: Suhas Padav, progressive jazz fusion pianist and composer, creator of Fractals
